source.title: Human oversight of agentic systems in practice: Examining the oversight work, challenges, and heuristics of developers using software agents

extraction.method: Python standard-library HTMLParser over the server-rendered Microsoft Research publication and BibTeX pages
extraction.scope: Official title, authors, venue, publication metadata, abstract, and BibTeX; scripts, styles, navigation, and site chrome excluded
extraction.notes: The Microsoft Research page identifies FAccT and its BibTeX identifies year 2026 and month July. The page's citation_publication_date is recorded separately because it reflects a day-level site metadata value. This artifact supports publication-metadata verification only; the immutable arXiv v1 PDF is the full paper evidence, and no deep review is claimed.
